cases.prompt: We just deployed — run a canary and watch production for console errors and regressions.

assertions.text: Watches the live app via the browse daemon for console errors, performance regressions, and page failures.
Takes periodic screenshots and compares against pre-deploy baselines to detect anomalies.
Produces a post-deploy health report with anomaly alerts.

cases.prompt: 배포 후 프로덕션 모니터링해줘. 이상 생기면 알려주는 canary 돌려.

assertions.text: Captures periodic screenshots of the live app and checks for console errors.
Alerts on anomalies when the live app deviates from the pre-deploy baseline.
Outputs a post-deploy canary health report rather than a one-off check.
